review_title: Perfect to manage multiple domains
description: Using cookiebot allowed us to be on top of our cookie management not only for GDPR compliance but also to comply with our internal legal policies, I'd love so much using it that I've moved to other companies and I still recommend always to use cookiebot.
author: Roxanna C.
pros: Being able to manage all the cookies restrictions from different pages within the company has being ideal for our team.
cons: I was very used to the cookiebot manager in the old platform now that we have another dashboard is a bit of a struggle but I'll get used to it ;)

review_title: First start
description: A very useful application, but it requires a number of improvements when it comes to working with WordPress. It's necessary to study the help, which isn't updated to the latest UI version.
author: Piotr W.
pros: 1_ The application is aligned with current law. 2_ Extensive functionality and customization options. 3_ Reports and data management useful for large-scale solutions. 4_ The paid version of the service compares very favorably with other similar apps. It's a good price-to-quality ratio.
cons: 1_ No user interface available in languages ​​such as German or Polish 2_ The payment management system is quite complicated 3_ Too fragmented structure - profile > domain > billing account etc.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Helping keep on top of GDPR
author: Lee C.
pros: Really useful review of GDPR requirements on our website. Regular scans reveal new potential issues and help keep us on top of our requirements.
cons: No particular issues discovered so far. Interface can feel complex, but it's providing a very technical service.

review_title: Awesome product and great support team
description: Very good support assisting with any challenge, different implementation options making th eproduct suitable to any context
author: Madlena T.
pros: Granularity of adaptations making any context possible to cover
cons: More specific cases technical documentation needed (e.g. DPS with multiple scripts handling)

review_title: The best CMP solution for us
author: Vlad B.
pros: The overall user experience is fantastic. Even if you’re not using their integrations for different CMS or e-commerce platforms, but you’re implementing a custom integration to a React app, the process was well-documented and felt really thought-out.
cons: Based on their definition of a session, it is quite hard to estimate the actual pricing plan that will be needed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The most intuitive CMP I know
description: I'm a partner with Usercentrics for quite some years, implementing it in multiple websites. Overall it's easy to use and I get help when needed, so I'm very happy recommending it to others.
author: Tobias K.
pros: The initial setup is quite easy and the interface self explaining. When needed I can contact support and get sufficient help pretty fast.
cons: Not sure if I'm using it wrong, but a regular notification about new services on the website, which aren't captured in the tool yet, would be very helpful.

review_title: Probably the best GDPR-compliant CMP
description: Usercentrics offered an excellent onboarding experience with a smooth setup, allowing us to complete it in under a day.
author: Daniel R.
pros: European product, GDPR compliant, easy setup with minimal development input.
cons: I want more options for personalizing the consent banner, such as size and position.

review_title: Excellent compliance at a cost ;)
description: Good, but effort to setup, but automatic crawler makes it more easier than selecting every service manually.
author: Christoph K.
pros: Integration of Privacy Policy customization for maximum compliance with GDPR / DSGBVO, integrated service crawler.
cons: Price ;) Would not mind a little less, though there is significant value for the money spent on the service.

review_title: User review
author: Jussi T.
pros: Everything was very easy to setup. Guides are easily available. Pricing in very affordable. We are very pleased with usercentrics.
cons: Nothing to complain at this point. Every thing has been running smoothly. If one thing needs to be said, basic plan should cover customization for cookie window.

review_title: Nice tool acquisitions, not a great integration login-wise
description: An overall very sympathetic company with a very reliable and profen tool (cookiebot) and a lot of promise in the field of server side tracking.
author: Patrick B.
pros: The ease of use in setting up Cookiebot - one of the best CMPs out there. I do also like the approach of covering server side tracking as well, though it's not really "ready" yet in my opinion.
cons: The login system ist an aboluste nightmare at the moment - depending on when one created a usercentrics or cookiebot account the login logic is different and not clear at all at the moment.

review_title: Easy to implement, well-organized system
author: Jozsef G.
pros: Easy to implement, well-organized system that can be installed with minimal knowledge. Good support, continuous updates, up-to-date legal compliance.
cons: I can't find anything to complain about in this service. Especially since I'm using the free version, it perfectly meets my needs.

review_title: Positive experience with UserCentrics
author: Nicolas B.
pros: Product is easy to use and set up and answers a simple need for a reasonable price.
cons: Not a clear view on product roadmap, having a view on coming evolutions would help.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent experience
author: Valentina T.
pros: Easy process, easy to navigate, good experience
cons: There is nothing particular I could mention
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ensuring peace of mind with Usercentrics
description: I really like Usercentrics. It's a fantastic tool that helps us keep our users' information private and follow the rules. I think it's great for any kind of business, big or small. I suggest trying it out!
author: Kieran H.
pros: As a co-founder of a mid-sized company, I know that consent management can be a daunting task. There are so many regulations to keep up with, and it can be hard to find a platform that is both easy to use and effective.Usercentrics is a great consent management platform. It's easy to use, customizable, and compliant with regulations. I can create and customize consent banners and cookie notices in minutes, and I can track user consents and compliance with regulations in real time.I also love the fact that Usercentrics integrates with so many other tools that we use, like our marketing automation platform and our CRM system. This makes it easy to automate our consent management process and integrate consent data with other parts of our business.The support from Usercentrics has also been great. Their team is always quick to respond to our questions, and they're always willing to help us get the most out of the platform.
cons: The documentation is not consistently the best, but the support is excellent enough to make up for it.

review_title: Easy way to manage user consent
description: I believe Usercentrics is leading the way in consent management. It's an all-inclusive platform that covers consent collection, privacy policy management, and boosting overall privacy compliance. I'm excited about the future of privacy management, thanks to Usercentrics!
author: Mustafa K.
pros: With Usercentrics, I can easily gather consent and follow privacy rules. It's so simple to use and personalize according to our needs.Our website is now much more privacy-friendly, all thanks to Usercentrics. I have full control over the cookies and tracking methods in use, and I can obtain consent from our users without any hassle.Usercentrics is truly a consent management powerhouse. I'm particularly fond of its automatic website scans, which keep me updated on new cookies and tracking technologies. It even takes care of updating our privacy policy automatically – a real time-saver!Finally, It ensures we gather user consent in ways that align perfectly with regulations. It's like having a trustworthy ally in privacy compliance.
cons: Usercentrics is a handy tool for consent and privacy, but the interface could be more intuitive. Sometimes, finding specific settings takes a bit of extra effort.

review_title: Easy to use Consent Management Platform
description: When evaluating many CMPs (and also testing others) the only option left was using UserCentrics due to feature completeness, good support and flexibility. Highly recommend UserCentrics as CMP
author: Felix S.
pros: - easy to implement (Tag Manager integration) - customer service - documentation - good configuration options (wording, ux, ...)
cons: none (so far), if there as something negative this was probably the general understanding of consent management and how to handle which pixel (marketing, essential, ..). But this was no problem of UserCentrics, but internal argumentation

review_title: Einfache Funktionen gehen nicht in den Basis-Tarifen
description: Dass ich solche scheinbar einfachen Elemente, wie eine Überschrift oder einen Button nur durch Zahlung eines hohen monatlichen Betrags ändern kann, hat mich mehr als enttäuscht. Leider musste ich direkt ein Jahresabo buchen
author: Jonas K.
pros: Usercentrics bietet einige tolle Funktionen, so sind zum Beispiel die Datenschutztexte der einzelnen Tools nach meinem Eindruck sehr gut.
cons: Ich habe leider keine guten Erfahrungen mit Usercentrics gemacht. Sie selbst nutzen den Cookie-Banner auf ihrer eigenen Website. Ich dachte, dass die gleiche UI dann auch bei der Buchung eines Tarifs gewählt werden kann, dies ist nach meiner Erfahrung jedoch nicht so: Die Überschrift kann ich nur im Business Tarif für 39 € / Monat ändern, den Text des Buttons sogar nur im Enterprise Paket (Preis auf Anfrage).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: GDPR made simple
description: Exceptional customer support & product that helped us solve the GDPR issue. I can highly recommend it!
author: Stefan W.
pros: Easy integration Excellent customer support One-stop Solution
cons: There are no disadvantages of this software

review_title: Powerful Consent Management Platform
description: Currently going through a website redesign. We reached out to Usercentrics while we were looking for a tool that would allow us to comply with legal requirements while also proving to be a well-engineered software which we could customize to meet our own specific needs. Integrating all the technologies we utilize with the CMP proved to be effortless and I'd definitely recommend implementing Usercentrics to manage privacy settings and legal compliance.
author: Andy M.
pros: -Integrations are easy to manage -UI is fully customizable (very easy to customize popup to match corporate CI with access to CSS ) - Flexibility when it comes to wording and configuring the user journey. - Effortless implementation
cons: - Nothing to complain about at this stage
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best Consent Platform on the market
author: Frederic L.
pros: Easy to integrate and all the right feature. Great sales and support team as well.
cons: There is really nothing to complain about.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Integration mit dem Baukasten WIX.com funktioniert nicht
description: Die Cookies müssen über eine Liste mit einer Vielzahl an Möglichkeiten angewählt werden. Ich hätte gehofft, dass das über einen automatisierten Seitenscan funktioniert.
author: Sabine B.
pros: Da ich die Software nicht mit WIX.com benutzen konnte, kann ich hier keine Bewertung abgeben. Dazu muss ich sagen, dass ich Grafikerin bin, keine Entwicklerin/Programmiererin. Aber ein Konkurrenzprodukt funktioniert für mich benutzerfreundlich und intuitiv, sodass ich von Usercentrics wieder Abstand genommen habe.
cons: Die fehlende Kompatibilität mit WIX.com.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
